positive: A symmetrical, detailed illustration featuring bioluminescent woodland creatures and celestial elements, forming a central, intricate mandala pattern. The primary subjects include stylized glowing moths, crystalline flora, and nebular cloud swirls that intertwine with constellations and geometric patterns. The style is neo-whimsical graphic art, combining deep vaporwave tones with detailed engraving aesthetics. Color palette emphasizes high-contrast deep indigo, electric cyan, emerald green, and soft lavender glow. Lighting must be dramatic, utilizing edge-glow and soft neon emission against a dark, matte background. Composition must be perfectly centered and tileable, suitable for large-scale apparel printing, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and complex yet readable line work. Minimalist, high-impact, symmetrical, centered.
negative: blur, grain, noise, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, cropped, worst quality, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, disfigured, extra limbs, poorly drawn, human, writing, jpeg artifacts
